sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after MOUSE action
def find_player(seg):
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] in ('b', 'Y') and n['pixels'] < 10:
            b = n['boundary']
            if b:
                center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)//len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)//len(b))
                return center
    return None

def count_greens(seg):
    return sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5)

before_player = find_player(last_transition.before_frame.segmentation)
after_player = find_player(current_frame.segmentation)
before_greens = count_greens(last_transition.before_frame.segmentation)
after_greens = count_greens(current_frame.segmentation)

print(f"Player: {before_player} -> {after_player}")
print(f"Green blocks: {before_greens} -> {after_greens}")

# List all green block centers now
greens = [n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5]
print(f"\nCurrent green blocks ({len(greens)}):")
for g in greens:
    b = g['boundary']
    center = (sum(p[0] for p in b)//len(b), sum(p[1] for p in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  center~{center}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
